title: Unify ActionQueue Synchronization
description:
ActionQueue uses ConcurrentQueue<ActionData> but mixes lock-protected (EnqueueAll, ClearAndEnqueue) and lock-free (Enqueue, Clear, Dequeue, Peek) operations. The documented atomic interrupt guarantee of ClearAndEnqueue is not actually global because Enqueue and Clear don't take the same lock.

Source: msa_code_audit_report-6-24-26.md (Finding 5), msa_followup_audit-6-24-26.md (Finding 3)

Requirements:
1. Either enforce one lock for all mutating operations, or narrow the documented guarantee to best-effort local atomicity only
2. If the queue models strict priority semantics, use a single synchronization strategy consistently
3. Add a concurrency test that interleaves Enqueue, Clear, and ClearAndEnqueue

Files: Agent.Core/Models/ActionQueue.cs

comments.author: SteveBot
comments.body: Converted from orphan .md file (TSK-0115.md) to canonical .json format as part of task store cleanup council 2026-06-27. Original .md indicated status Done, Sprint 49 Wave E.
